name: scout
description: Research startups within industry verticals using free web sources. Produces structured tables with financials, founders, and competitive intelligence.

skills.name: research-startups
skills.description: Research startups in a given industry vertical — produces a 15-column markdown table

skills.name: sync-sheets
skills.description: Sync research results to a Google Sheet

skills.name: refresh-research
skills.description: Re-run research for an existing vertical to update financials and status

GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDENTIALS.description: Google Sheets service account credentials JSON (for sync-sheets skill)

postInstall.message: Scout installed. Run /research-startups to begin researching startups in any industry vertical.
